data.title: Global market for Software-Defined Vehicles (SDVs) to grow significantly from 2026-2036. Report profiles 63 key players. Major shift in automotive industry.
data.description: In Dublin, the "Global Software-Defined Vehicles (SDVs) Market 2026-2036" report has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This market is undergoing a significant shift in the automotive industry, reshaping the concept, development, manufacture, and monetization of vehicles. It covers various aspects such as software development, electronic/electrical architecture, and hardware components. This transformative market is anticipated to greatly impact the industry in the coming years.

data.title: Natalie Polson becomes Chief Revenue Officer at Trellix, overseeing global sales for AI-powered cybersecurity company.
data.description: In San Jose, California, Trellix, a leading provider of AI-powered cybersecurity solutions, has appointed Natalie Polson as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Polson will lead the global sales team, develop go-to-market plans, and contribute to driving revenue growth in her new role. She will be part of Trellix’s executive leadership and report to CEO Vishal Rao. Polson brings valuable experience to the company as they look towards enhancing revenue streams.

data.title: Interactive Brokers launches IBKR Desktop version 1.0, offering comprehensive trading experience in one platform.
data.description: Interactive Brokers, a company listed on Nasdaq as IBKR, has officially released Version 1.0 of IBKR Desktop. This new software version is now available for use in Greenwich, Connecticut.

data.title: IJC seeks public input on Draft 2025 Report on Great Lakes protection. 1-month consultation launched in Ottawa.
data.description: In Ottawa, ON on July 31, 2025, the International Joint Commission (IJC) has opened public feedback on the Draft 2025 Review of the "Protection of the Waters of the Great Lakes" report. This marks the second decadal review on the matter by the IJC.

data.title: Charter stockholders approve necessary proposals for Cox Communications transaction. - July 31, 2025. 99 characters.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) based in Stamford, Connecticut, confirmed that their stockholders have given the green light to the proposals essential for finalizing the transaction with Cox Communications. The successful approval indicates a significant step towards completing the deal between the two companies.

data.title: Nearmap introduces new tools for insurers, reducing claim cycles and costs with 3D mesh technology. Available on XactAnalysis® and Xactimate®.
data.description: Verisk has introduced advanced 3D mesh technology with accurate roof and exterior measurements on its platforms XactAnalysis® and Xactimate® in a recent announcement on July 31, 2025. Nearmap, a key player in property and location intelligence for insurance companies, disclosed the launch of two new services.

data.title: Glaucoma Treatment Devices Market to grow from $4.5B in 2024 to $7.2B in 2033, boosted by minimally invasive tech advancements & rising awareness.
data.description: The Glaucoma Treatment Devices Market is experiencing significant growth due to the increasing global occurrence of glaucoma, as well as the growing awareness surrounding early diagnosis. The sector is also benefiting from advancements in minimally invasive treatment options. The introduction of technologically advanced surgical devices is contributing to this growth trend. This market growth is bolstered by supportive factors such as a considerable rise in the number of cases, with a projected market value increase of [insert specific number here], highlighting the demand for efficient glaucoma treatment solutions.

data.title: Jay Vaughn named CEO of Opifex-Synergy, a top US equipment rental company formed by Opifex LLC and Synergy Equipment merger in 2024.
data.description: Opifex-Synergy, a prominent independent equipment rental company in the U.S., has appointed Joseph “Jay” Vaughn III as its new Chief Executive Officer. This decision comes after the successful merger in 2024 of Opifex LLC and Synergy Equipment, creating a leading provider catering to infrastructure, commercial, and industrial sectors in the Southern U.S. Vaughn, who was a co-founder of Opifex LLC, has taken on the new role at a crucial time for the company. The merger has significantly boosted the company's position in the market, solidifying its presence as a top player in the industry.

data.title: Sanofi Q2 sales of $11.33B miss consensus, up 6% YOY. Op income at €2.46B, down 2.4%. Dupixent sales up 21%, hitting €3.83B.
data.description: Sanofi SA (NASDAQ: SNY) announced second-quarter sales of $11.33 billion (€9.99 billion euros), slightly below the expected $11.53 billion consensus. Sales saw a 6% increase year over year, up 10.1% in constant currency, thanks to growth in Immunology, pharmaceutical launches, and Beyfortus. For the Q2 of 2025, business operating income was recorded at €2.46 billion, a 2.4% decrease compared to the previous year, but up 3% in constant currency. First-half operating income surged to €5.36 billion, an 8.6% increase (10.8% in constant currency). The reported adjusted EPS was 1.59 euros or 90 cents per ADS, falling short of the estimated 96 cents, up 1.9% (8.3% in constant currency). Pharma launches notably drove sales up by 39.8%, amounting to €897 million, with ALTUVIIIO sales at €291 million (a 91.8% increase in constant currency). Dupixent sales rose by 21.1% to 3.83 billion Euros, attributed to the COPD launch.

data.title: PureHealth's H1 2025 results show AED 13.6B revenue and AED 1.03B net profit, a 9% YoY increase.
data.description: PureHealth Holding PJSC, the leading healthcare group in the Middle East, disclosed its financial performance for the six months concluding on June 30, 2025. The Group, listed as PUREHEALTH on ADX, reported a 9% increase compared to the previous year. Based in Abu Dhabi, UAE, the company stands out as a prominent player in the healthcare sector, constantly expanding its presence and impact on the region.

data.title: Loci Capital and Hersh Equity Group purchase 230,000 SF industrial portfolio in Broward County with 116 suites.
data.description: A real estate investment company, Loci Capital, has revealed the purchase of a small-bay industrial portfolio in West Park, Florida. This acquisition, made in collaboration with Hersh Equity Group (HEG), includes six buildings spanning a total of 230,000 square feet. Situated in the Fort Lauderdale MSA, the portfolio comprises 116 suites ranging from 1,000 to 2,000 square feet each. These properties are conveniently located near a Home Depot and serve the increasing need for small industrial spaces.

data.title: Olympus partners with American Lung Association to educate on lung nodule management. Focus on guiding patients after detection.
data.description: A recent initiative launched aims to support patients upon the detection of a lung nodule. Located in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, the program was introduced on July 31, 2025, by Olympus Corp. of the Americas (OCA). This global medical technology firm is dedicated to enhancing healthcare outcomes. The initiative was rolled out in recognition of World Lung Cancer Day, observed annually on August 1. The program focuses on guiding patients through the process following the detection of a lung nodule, assisting them in understanding and navigating their healthcare journey.

data.title: Cosmo Films Inc. USA adds new Slitter Rewinder to reduce customer wait time from 2-3 months to 10-15 days - PRNewswire
data.description: A recent installation aims to improve customer service by offering quicker delivery options, significantly cutting down customer order wait times from 2–3 months to just 10–15 days. The subsidiary, Cosmo Films Inc. USA, under Cosmo First Limited (formerly Cosmo Films Limited), made this announcement in Chicago on July 31, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase to release Q2 earnings; expected to report $1.51/share, $1.59B revenue. Shares rose 1.6% to $377.48.
data.description: On Thursday, July 31, Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) will report its second-quarter earnings after the market closes. Analysts forecast earnings of $1.51 per share, a significant increase from the 14 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $1.59 billion, up from $1.45 billion in the previous year. Despite missing analyst expectations in the first quarter, Coinbase has exceeded estimates in nine of the past ten quarters. Closing at $377.48 on Wednesday, Coinbase's stock rose by 1.6%. For further insights, readers can refer to Benzinga Pro for the latest analyst ratings, sortable by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, and rating.

data.title: Nasdaq up by 1.26%; Dow up by 0.24% while Microsoft's Q4 revenue at $76.4B, up by 17%, beats estimates.
data.description: U.S. stocks performed well today, with the Nasdaq Composite rising over 1%, the Dow increasing by 0.24% to 44,566.33, the NASDAQ jumping by 1.26% to 21,395.66, and the S&P 500 climbing by 0.76% to 6,411.57. Communication services shares surged by 2.9%, while health care stocks dipped by 0.7%. Microsoft Corp reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter results, with revenue reaching $76.44 billion, up 17% year-over-year, surpassing estimates. The company's earnings per share were $3.65, beating estimates of $3.37. Soligenix, Inc. stocks surged by 73% to $2.1793. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
